headline: PR-1 of the Astryx coverage build (#76) shipped to claude/design-system-build-plan-xrj5qm: 9 zero-dependency Tier-1 native primitives (Kbd, StatusDot, Timestamp, Blockquote, VisuallyHidden, AvatarGroup, ButtonGroup, InputGroup, CircularProgress) with tests, stories, Code Connect stubs, and Swiss-canon fixtures. All Lean-gate-set gates green (typecheck, lint --max-warnings=0, 980 vitest, contrast, app build + size-limit, smoke:consumer, storybook). Minor changeset queued for 0.12.0.
next: PR-2: Tier-1 Radix skins (HdsToggleButton, HdsAlertDialog, HdsHoverCard, HdsContextMenu, HdsAspectRatio) — adds 5 @radix-ui deps
PR-3: promote internals (SideNav, CommandPalette, HdsLightbox) to public API
PR-4+: Tier-2 pattern layer (0.13.0); Tier-3 date/time family needs a date-lib ADR first
blocked: Tier-3 date/time components blocked on a date-lib ADR (react-day-picker v9 + date-fns recommended)
